case_number: Criminal Transfer Application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 32 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 21-06-2021 Applicant-Gul Feroze Kalwar, present in person. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant submits that he will be satisfied and will not press the present Criminal Transfer Application, if he is given appropriate security to enable him to reach the concerned Court comfortably without any fear and threat to his life allegedly on behalf of the private respondents. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Deputy Prosecutor General for the State, records no objection to the proposal of the applicant. By consent keeping the above in mind, DIGP Sukkur is directed to give proper direction to the concerned SHO of the area of residence of the applicant to provide appropriate security to applicant-Gul Feroze Kalwar, Advocate to reach the concerned Court on each and every date of hearing before learned Additional Sessions Judge-IV, Mirpur Mathelo in Sessions Case No.193/2020, which date will be communicated to the concerned police officer three days prior to the date of hearing, so that appropriate arrangements can be made in advance. Accordingly, this Criminal Transfer Application is dismissed as not pressed. Let the copy of this order be sent to DIGP Sukkur for compliance. J U D G E Abdul Basit
